sprints.title: Bootstrap harness + ce + graphify default workflow
sprints.goal: 把仓库入口、harness 文档、记忆层和 graphify 本地自动化收口成默认工作流。
exit_criteria: AGENTS.md、docs/harness/dualpad-builder.md 和 .dualpad-builder/ 已落地
graphify setup 可在 repo root 一次完成 hooks、.codex/hooks.json 和首轮 graph build
默认 close-out 命令已经固定到 workflow 文档和入口规则里
verification: python3 -m graphify query "show the main flow"

sprints.title: Runtime input pipeline truth alignment
sprints.goal: 记录 PH8b baseline 下的 runtime input pipeline truth：src/input_v2/ 是唯一正式 runtime mainline。
exit_criteria: README、ARCHITECTURE、AGENTS、DOC_INDEX、harness、spec 与 current input pipeline 对 src/input_v2/ 单主线描述一致
AuthoritativePollState 仅保留 legacy poll compatibility / XInput bridge 侧职责，不再作为 current mainline authority
reviewed-doc consistency lint 会拦截 retired pre-input_v2 mainline 回流

sprints.title: Route-health contract freeze
sprints.goal: 先冻结当前输入兼容态的 route_state / drain_reason / last_poll_age_ms / hook_installed 合同与验证面，不提前删掉 rollback gate 或 stale assist drain。
exit_criteria: route_state 继续固定为 active_fresh / active_stale / disabled
drain_reason、last_poll_age_ms 与 hook_installed 的当前兼容态合同在 current truth、Phase 0 与 builder memory 之间一致
本 slice 的 Do Not Do Yet 已写死：不删除 rollback gate / stale assist drain，不发明新的 route hierarchy
verification: docs/current_input_pipeline_zh.md 与 docs/plans/dualpad_rearchitecture/01_slice_phase0_freeze_and_replay_barrier_zh.md 的合同文本一致
builder memory 明确把 DP1a 登记为当前 gate，并把 hook_installed 纳入当前冻结字段
若本轮改动涉及代码文件，执行 python3 scripts/dev/setup_graphify_local.py rebuild --reason manual-closeout

sprints.title: Menu context policy and ownership follow-up
sprints.goal: 记录 PH8b baseline 下的 menu / presentation ownership truth，避免旧 MenuContextPolicy / InputContextNames 回流为 authority。
exit_criteria: menu / presentation ownership 当前由 input_v2 context、menu、presentation 与 published state 口径解释
旧 MenuContextPolicy / InputContextNames 不再作为 current runtime authority
builder memory 不再把 gameplay-menu ownership 写成仍待启动 runtime phase

sprints.title: Native routing and controlmap overlay follow-up
sprints.goal: 记录 PH8b baseline 下的 native routing / controlmap / helper backend 支持面，避免形成第二 runtime mainline。
exit_criteria: native routing、controlmap overlay 和 ModEvent helper backend 只作为支持 surface 记录
默认验证不再依赖旧 focused targets 替代 canonical Phase 8 CI
状态文件不再把 DP3 表示为未完成 current runtime work

sprints.title: Dynamic glyph current surface handoff
sprints.goal: 记录 PH8b baseline 下的 glyph / prompt compat truth：ScaleformGlyphBridge -> ScaleformPromptAdapter -> PromptRuntimeOwner -> PromptService。
exit_criteria: BindingManager、trigger reverse lookup 与 menu fallback 不再作为 current glyph authority
旧 SWF token / descriptor shape 保持兼容，不在 governance closeout 中变更
FavoritesMenu workspace 缺失仍被记录为边界，不写成当前 repo truth

sprints.title: Glyph compat diagnostics freeze
sprints.goal: 先把 glyph compat 链中的 status / fallback / ambiguity 收成内部诊断面，保持旧 SWF / delegate 返回 shape 不变，不提前跳到 PromptService。
exit_criteria: status / fallback / ambiguity 的当前归宿被正式写成内部诊断面，而不是旧 UI 对外 contract
旧 DualPad_GetActionGlyphToken 继续返回单个 token string；旧 DualPad_GetActionGlyph descriptor 继续保持 ok / buttonArtToken / semanticId / contextName
任何旧返回对象字段扩展都被明确延后到 Phase 6 prompt contract
verification: docs/main_menu_glyph_current_status_zh.md、work-packages README 与 builder memory 对旧外层 shape 的描述一致：token API 返回单个 token string；descriptor API 保持 ok / buttonArtToken / semanticId / contextName
若本轮改到 ScaleformGlyphBridge 或 SWF surface，补记录本机 SWF / Skyrim 手工验证结果
若本轮改动涉及代码文件，执行 python3 scripts/dev/setup_graphify_local.py rebuild --reason manual-closeout
计划文本没有把 PromptService / PromptDescriptor / PromptProjection 误写成当前下一步

sprints.title: Phase 0 replay barrier
sprints.goal: 在 DP1a / DP4a 完成后建立 repo-owned replay / diff / golden trace barrier，并把 FavoritesMenu 条件场景从默认退出条件中拆出。
exit_criteria: trace schema、recorder、replay harness、diff runner 和 Phase 0 mandatory scenarios 落地
validate-schema / materialize-fixture 与 dispatcher / processor runtime replay mode 有明确边界
dispatcher / processor runtime replay proof 通过后，candidate bundle 对 Phase 0 golden batch diff 为 0
10 个 repo-owned mandatory scenario bundle 齐全，phase0_scenarios.json 把 FavoritesMenu 标成 mandatory=false / conditional_live
.dualpad-builder/progress.md 记录 Phase 0 start / done / blocked 与验证结果
verification: xmake run DualPadReplayHarness -- --batch tests/replay/golden/phase0 --mode dispatcher --output-root build/replay-dispatcher
xmake run DualPadReplayHarness -- --batch tests/replay/golden/phase0 --mode processor --output-root build/replay-processor

sprints.title: Phase 1 catalog and manifest compiler
sprints.goal: 落地 ContextCatalog / ActionManifest / LegacyIniImporter / ManifestValidator，并冻结 manifest publication handoff。
exit_criteria: catalog 与 manifest schema 有固定字段、版本和 validation 规则
AtomicConfigReloader::Promote() 只负责 active bundle / epoch / LKG；ActionManifestPublisher::PublishPromotedBundle(...) 是唯一 ManifestEpochChanged producer seam
legacy ini import 不再由 runtime path 临场解释
verification: xmake run DualPadReplayHarness -- --batch tests/replay/golden/phase0 --mode dispatcher --output-root build/replay-dispatcher
xmake run DualPadReplayHarness -- --batch tests/replay/golden/phase0 --mode processor --output-root build/replay-processor

sprints.title: Phase 2 menu instance truth
sprints.goal: 重建菜单实例真相源、ContextResolver 和 ActionSetResolver，冻结 contextRevision / menuStackRevision / presentationPolicyId。
exit_criteria: UiMenuObserver、MenuInstanceRegistry、ContextResolver、ActionSetResolver 的 owner 边界落地
Shadow compare 覆盖 stable pointer、same-name duplicate、partial snapshot 与 presentationPolicyId publish parity
legacy context adapter 只剩兼容输出，不再是 menu instance truth

sprints.title: Phase 3 presentation split
sprints.goal: 拆分 InputModalityTracker，落地 SourceEvidenceCollector / PresentationProjection / SkyrimCompatibilitySurface。
exit_criteria: SourceEvidenceCollector 发布 DeviceFamilyChanged marker 与配对 SourceEvidence snapshot
DeviceFamilyChangedPayload.newRevision 与紧随其后的 SourceEvidenceSnapshot.deviceFamilyEvidence.deviceFamilyRevision 有 targeted test 覆盖
PresentationProjection 与 SkyrimCompatibilitySurface 分层清楚，rollback 边界固定
gameplay -> menu 首帧平台、menu reclaim 与 remap mode 有 shadow parity 或手工验证记录

sprints.title: Phase 4 action graph and interaction engine
sprints.goal: 把 trigger 语义迁移到 Action Graph / InteractionEngine，并冻结 compiled graph publication 与 runtime swap 入口。
exit_criteria: ControlPath、BindingModifier、InteractionSpec、DisplayBinding、CompiledActionGraph 合同落地
CompiledActionGraphPublisher::Publish(...) 是 compiled graph publication 与 hot-swap 的唯一入口，Phase 7 不再另造 publish 点
layer / combo / fail-closed / display binding 场景有 targeted tests

sprints.title: Phase 5 gameplay projection
sprints.goal: 用 GameplayProjectionFrame / RecoveryPlan / GameplayPresentationPublisher 取代 coordinator feedback loop。
exit_criteria: GameplayProjectionFrame 与 RecoveryPlan 的结构和执行顺序冻结
HardReset / SoftResync / clean baseline 的 native、helper、presentation 输出同步验证写成 targeted tests，不只依赖 replay diff
legacy coordinator feedback loop 不再是 gameplay projection authority

sprints.title: Phase 6 prompt projection
sprints.goal: 用 PromptProjection / PromptService 取代 glyph reverse lookup，并冻结旧 SWF API 兼容策略。
exit_criteria: PromptSnapshotRecord、PromptScope、PromptService 和 fail-closed 矩阵落地
旧 DualPad_GetActionGlyphToken / DualPad_GetActionGlyph 的兼容策略与 repo-owned startmenu.swf smoke gate 已验证
DP4a compat tests 不再阻止 Phase 6 fail-closed prompt contract
verification: 记录 repo-owned Interface/startmenu.swf smoke 结果

sprints.title: Phase 7 ingress and resync
sprints.goal: 重做 dispatcher / coalescing / resync，并以 ingress marker payload 作为 manifestEpoch / deviceFamilyRevision 的唯一边界来源。
exit_criteria: boundary key 四字段与 marker authoritative source 在正文和最终合同汇总中一致
SequenceGap / QueueOverflow / ManifestEpochChanged / DeviceFamilyChanged 的 recovery 规则有 targeted tests
legacy dispatcher / processor 只剩 adapter 角色，Phase 8 可删除残余 authority

sprints.title: Phase 8 cutover entry gate
sprints.goal: 确认 runtime closeout 与 governance closeout 的职责边界，再进入 09a / 09b。
exit_criteria: 09a 只负责 runtime closeout，09b 只负责 governance / docgen / CI closeout
6 类 canonical prove-out targets 的创建责任不推迟给 09b 首次补建
Phase 8 不重新设计 Phase 0-7 已冻结 runtime 合同
verification: 确认 S-PH7 已通过并写回 builder memory

sprints.title: Phase 8A runtime closeout
sprints.goal: 完成 runtime public surface swap、legacy deletion 和 shim shrink。
exit_criteria: runtime closeout 完成且旧 authority / fallback 被删除或收缩为明确 shim
DualPadReplayTests、DualPadInputV2Tests、DualPadIngressTests、DualPadPromptSnapshotTests、DualPadPropertyTests、DualPadFuzzRegressionTests 均可执行
replay root 仍固定为 tests/replay/golden/

sprints.title: Phase 8B governance closeout
sprints.goal: 收口 docgen provenance、reviewed docs 去重、canonical test targets、public-surface support proof 与默认 CI 接线。
exit_criteria: generated facts 固定在 docs/generated，reviewed docs 只保留 narrative
canonical tests 接入默认 CI，且不改名、不换 wrapper target；DualPadPresentationProjectionTests 作为 public-surface support proof 接入默认 CI，但不属于 canonical target
builder memory、baseline、CI 和 graphify close-out 口径一致
verification: 运行 09a 固定的 6 类 canonical tests
验证默认 CI 脚本引用同名 targets

sprints.title: Post-closeout validation, cleanup, and workflow honesty hardening
sprints.goal: PH0-PH8b closeout 后的验证、cleanup、reporting 与 workflow honesty hardening；不是新的 runtime phase。
exit_criteria: 只做 DP5-RC20 post-closeout governance / validation / reporting hardening，不重开 runtime mainline
不改 canonical target 名称、replay root、旧 SWF 返回 shape或 input_v2 runtime 合同
U0 contract preflight 已完成；U1-U5 必须按 issue 顺序分 slice 推进并记录 progress start / verification / closeout
verification: U0: docs/authoritative-baseline/dp5_rc20_contract_zh.md 已新增并从 authoritative baseline / DOC index 接入
U0: GitHub Meta #13、U0-U5 #7-#12 已创建；旧 #2-#6 已迁移并以 superseded/not_planned 关闭
后续具体 hardening slice 默认至少包含 scripts/ci/run_phase8_ci.ps1、builder JSON 校验、graphify rebuild 和 git diff --check
